_comment: 50-candidate dev set labels. Hand-label each candidate into tier 0-3. Used by scripts/tune_*.py to grid-search combiner weights. Format: candidate_id -> tier (0=irrelevant, 1=marginal, 2=relevant, 3=highly-relevant top-10 quality). Also includes 'notes' field for reasoning audit.
_status: TODO - hand-label these 50 candidates before tuning
_labeling_guide: Tier 3 (top-10 quality): ML/AI Engineer at product company, 5-9 YOE, shipped retrieval/ranking to real users, active on Redrob (last_active < 30d, response_rate > 0.5), Pune/Noida/Hyderabad/Mumbai/Delhi NCR location, notice < 30d. Tier 2: Solid match with 1 minor concern (e.g. slightly outside YOE band, or notice 60d). Tier 1: Adjacent skills, missing key requirement (e.g. Backend Engineer with ML side projects). Tier 0: Honeypot, trap, or hard disqualifier (services-only, research-only, marketing manager with AI skills, etc.).
